puzzle.title: The Listeners from the Unseen
puzzle.intro: Beyond the veil of the visible world, a hidden assembly gathered in the darkness, drawn to a sound that defied all they had known. They had wandered for ages without true guidance, until a voice pierced through the silence of their unseen realm and stirred something deep within. Tonight, you are invited to step beyond the shadows and uncover the identity of this mysterious group, whose encounter with divine words led them back to their people as warners of a truth that could not be contained.
clues: We are ancient beings, existing long before many nations you have read about, yet we are rarely spoken of in human tales.
Our nature is unlike yours, woven from elements of the unseen, and we have powers that defy the ordinary.
For ages, we roamed without true guidance, until a sound reached us that stirred something deep within.
We overheard a recitation like nothing we had ever heard, words that carried a weight beyond any speech.
We pressed close in secret, commanding our own to be silent, and when the verses concluded, we could not stay still.
We returned to our people and declared: 'O our people, we have heard a Book revealed after Moses, confirming what was before it, guiding to the truth.'

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The Hawariyyun (Disciples of Isa)
The Jinn who believed after hearing the Quran
The Companions of the Cave
The angels of the lowest heaven
The people of Pharaoh who followed his path
identity.answer: The Jinn who believed after hearing the Quran

trial.label: Trial / Event
options: We were cast out for refusing to bow before a newly created being
We were sealed in a cave for three hundred and nine years
We were commanded to cross a sea that split before us
We were sent to a land of magic to learn sorcery
We listened to a recitation in secret and were transformed by it
trial.answer: We listened to a recitation in secret and were transformed by it

location.label: Key Element
options: A golden calf fashioned from the ornaments of a people
A cave in which sleep lasted for generations
Two angels in Babylon who taught forbidden knowledge
A book revealed after Moses, confirming the Torah
A burning bush atop a holy mount
location.answer: A book revealed after Moses, confirming the Torah

outcome.label: Outcome
options: We were cursed until the Day of Judgment
We rose against a mighty ruler and built a barrier in the land
We were transformed into apes and swine
We returned to our people as warners, proclaiming belief
We were drowned in the sea alongside our leader
outcome.answer: We returned to our people as warners, proclaiming belief

puzzle.arabic: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًۭا
puzzle.verse: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone. (72:2)
